title: dampiera coronata
intro: Dampiera coronata, also known as the crown daisy, is a flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae native to Australia. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Dampiera coronata is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Dampiera coronata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
